title: Trump Accounts get a boost from employer contributions — Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are the latest to offer matching programs
summary: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley have joined other major companies in offering matching contributions for Trump Accounts to employees, expanding corporate adoption of these investment vehicles and signaling growing institutional support.
content: The growing list of companies that will match contributions to Trump Accounts for their employees now includes Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.

zh.title: Trump账户从雇主贡献中获得提升——高盛和摩根士丹利是最新提供匹配计划的公司
zh.summary: 高盛和摩根士丹利已加入其他主要公司，为员工提供Trump账户匹配贡献，扩大了这些投资工具的企业采用，并标志着机构支持的增加。

title: Olympian David Hearn indicted in Reflecting Pool destruction of property case
summary: Olympic athlete David Hearn has been indicted for destruction of property at the Reflecting Pool, with U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro citing his admission to removing sealant from the landmark.
content: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said that David Hearn, by his "own admission ... reached down into the pool" to rip up sealant.

zh.title: 奥运选手David Hearn因倒影池财产破坏案被起诉
zh.summary: 奥运选手David Hearn因在倒影池破坏财产而被起诉，美国检察官Jeanine Pirro引用他承认从该地标上移除密封剂的事实。

title: This Adobe analyst is going against the grain by telling investors to buy the stock
summary: An HSBC analyst has issued a contrarian buy recommendation for Adobe stock, bucking consensus sentiment and contributing to the company's recent market rally.
content: Adobe’s stock is rallying after a contrarian upgrade at HSBC.

zh.title: 这位Adobe分析师逆势而为，告诉投资者购买该股票
zh.summary: 一位汇丰银行分析师对Adobe股票发布了逆向买入建议，反驳共识观点，并促进了该公司最近的市场上涨。

title: Why June’s jobs and inflation data are bullish for bonds
summary: June's employment and inflation data point to favorable conditions for bond markets, though the jobs report underperformed expectations in key metrics.
content: The new jobs report is worse than many people realize.

zh.title: 为什么六月就业和通胀数据对债券有利
zh.summary: 六月的就业和通胀数据表明债券市场前景看好,尽管就业报告在关键指标上未达预期。

title: My doctor friend objected to his hospital’s fundraising tactics. Did management go too far?
summary: A physician has challenged his hospital's fundraising practices as exploitative of doctors and their patient relationships, raising ethical concerns about institutional tactics.
content: “This shocking program was exploiting doctors and the trust inherent in their relationships with patients.”

zh.title: 我医生朋友反对他所在医院的筹款策略。管理层做得太过分了吗?
zh.summary: 一位医生质疑他所在医院的筹款实践,认为其对医生及其患者关系构成剥削,对机构策略提出了伦理问题。

title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
summary: President Trump purchased significant stakes in tech companies including Apple and Nvidia the day before reversing tariff policies, which subsequently fueled a market rebound.
content: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.

zh.title: 特朗普在关税政策逆转引发反弹前购买苹果、英伟达等科技巨头股票
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普在扭转关税政策前一天购买了包括苹果和英伟达在内的科技公司的大量股份,随后推动了市场反弹。

title: Levi's, The North Face and Columbia are turning to women to fuel their next phase of growth
summary: Major apparel brands including Levi's, The North Face, and Columbia are significantly expanding their women's product lines and marketing investments to capture growth opportunities.
content: Legacy apparel brands including VF Corp., Levi's, and Columbia are investing more heavily in women's products and marketing.

zh.title: 李维斯、北面和哥伦比亚将目光转向女性消费者以推动下一阶段的增长
zh.summary: 包括李维斯、北面和哥伦比亚在内的主要服装品牌正在大幅扩展其女性产品线和营销投资，以抓住增长机会。

title: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
summary: The government has granted pubs extended hours until 5am for an England-Mexico World Cup match, reversing its earlier decision not to relax licensing restrictions further.
content: The government had initially said it would not relax licensing laws further for the World Cup.

zh.title: 英格兰对墨西哥世界杯比赛期间允许酒吧营业至凌晨5点
zh.summary: 政府已授权酒吧在英格兰对墨西哥世界杯比赛期间可营业至凌晨5点，撤销了之前不进一步放宽许可证限制的决定。

title: The dollar’s strength is quietly risking another yen ‘carry trade’ blowup
summary: The dollar's continued strength creates significant risk for another yen carry trade crisis, with the yen-dollar exchange rate now a critical market pressure point.
content: There’s a lot riding in markets on the current yen-dollar balance.

zh.title: 美元强势悄然增加日元"套利交易"再次崩溃的风险
zh.summary: 美元持续强势为另一场日元套利交易危机创造了重大风险，日元对美元汇率现已成为关键的市场压力点。

title: Concerts are increasingly for superfans and the rich, analysts say
summary: Concert venues are increasingly reserving premium seating and exclusive services for wealthy patrons and superfans, with some arenas devoting nearly a third of capacity to high-end offerings.
content: Some arenas are devoting nearly a third of their space to premium seats and services.

zh.title: 分析师称音乐会越来越成为超级粉丝和富人的专场
zh.summary: 音乐会场所越来越多地为富有顾客和超级粉丝保留高级座位和专属服务,一些竞技场将近三分之一的容量用于高端产品。

title: Oil prices are now back to prewar levels, but the market is not. Here’s what could happen next.
summary: Oil prices have retreated to pre-Iran war levels, but underlying market conditions remain abnormal due to persistent disruptions in shipping routes, supply chains, and demand patterns.
content: Oil prices have finally fallen back to pre-Iran war levels — but the crude market is far from seeing a normalization of shipping, oil supplies and demand that such a big retreat implies.

zh.title: 油价已回到战前水平,但市场并未恢复。接下来可能发生什么
zh.summary: 油价已回退到伊朗战争前水平,但由于航运路线、供应链和需求模式的持续中断,潜在的市场状况仍然异常。

title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
summary: Labor force participation has declined to a 50-year low outside the Covid era, indicating jobseekers are withdrawing from the market despite marginal unemployment rate improvements.
content: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

zh.title: 求职者放弃了:劳动力参与率跌至50年来的最低水平(新冠疫情时期除外)
zh.summary: 劳动力参与率已下降至除新冠疫情外50年来的最低水平,表明尽管失业率小幅改善,求职者仍在退出市场。

title: Dow rides into new week at record high. What investors are watching ahead
summary: The Dow Jones reaches record highs as investors evaluate market momentum and consider what economic conditions may develop in the second half of the year.
content: Investors are wondering what the second half of the year will bring after big gains for stocks.

zh.title: 道琼斯指数创历史新高 投资者关注下半年前景
zh.summary: 道琼斯指数创新高，投资者评估市场势头，并思考今年下半年可能出现的经济状况。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Rivian, Tesla, Sandisk, Blue Owl, AeroVironment & more
summary: Multiple stocks including Rivian, Tesla, Sandisk, Blue Owl, and AeroVironment are experiencing significant price movements during midday trading.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 午盘股票大幅波动：Rivian、特斯拉、闪迪、蓝猫头鹰、AeroVironment等
zh.summary: 包括Rivian、特斯拉、闪迪、蓝猫头鹰和AeroVironment在内的多支股票在午盘交易中出现显著价格波动。

title: Can our fridges cope with heatwaves?
summary: Many refrigerators lack the capacity to function properly during extreme heat events, creating food safety risks as heatwaves become more frequent and severe.
content: An expert says many can not handle the high temperatures we have been experiencing.

zh.title: 冰箱能应对热浪吗？
zh.summary: 许多冰箱在极端高温事件中缺乏正常运作的能力，随着热浪变得越来越频繁和严重，这造成了食品安全风险。

title: Stock market gains minted nearly 1 million new millionaires in 2025, new UBS report says
summary: Global personal wealth surged 10.8% in 2025, the largest increase since 2017 according to UBS, creating nearly 1 million new millionaires. This wealth expansion reflects strong market recovery and is significant for understanding global economic trends and inequality dynamics.
content: Global personal wealth surged by 10.8% in 2025, the biggest jump since 2017, per UBS.

zh.title: 2025年股市涨幅创造近100万名新百万富翁，瑞银最新报告显示
zh.summary: 2025年全球个人财富激增10.8%，创下2017年以来最大增幅，根据瑞银集团数据创造了近100万名新百万富翁。这一财富扩张反映了市场强劲复苏，对理解全球经济趋势和不平等动态具有重要意义。

title: Tesla deliveries jump 25% over last year, blowing past expectations
summary: Tesla's deliveries jumped 25% year-over-year, exceeding analyst expectations and marking a sharp reversal from prior years of declining sales. The surge demonstrates the company's recovery from earlier consumer backlash and underscores robust demand for its vehicles.
content: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.

zh.title: 特斯拉交付量同比增长25%，远超预期
zh.summary: 特斯拉交付量同比增长25%，超过分析师预期，标志着该公司从早期消费者抵触导致的销售下滑中急剧反转。这一激增表明公司已从消费者反感中恢复，突显了对其车辆的强劲需求。

title: Brookfield wants to build AI data centers in London’s answer to Wall Street
summary: Brookfield is expanding its AI infrastructure footprint by planning data centers in London's Canary Wharf, capitalizing on surging demand for AI computing capacity in the U.K. The move signals growing investment in AI infrastructure across major financial centers globally.
content: Brookfield's CEO said the firm is bringing data centers to London's Canary Wharf, as demand for AI infrastructure in the U.K. soars.

zh.title: Brookfield欲在伦敦金融城建设AI数据中心
zh.summary: Brookfield通过在伦敦金丝雀码头规划数据中心来扩展其AI基础设施版图，以抓住英国AI计算能力需求的激增。这一举措表明全球主要金融中心对AI基础设施的投资日益增加。

title: Trump says 'everybody's profiting' from recent market rallies — but it’s mostly the 1%
summary: While stock market rallies have boosted wealth, a significant portion of U.S. households lack equity exposure and have not benefited from bull market gains. The data underscores wealth inequality concerns despite overall market strength.
content: A large share of U.S. households have no exposure to equities and have not benefited from the bull market.

zh.title: 特朗普说"每个人都在"从近期股市反弹中获利——但这主要是1%的人
zh.summary: 虽然股市反弹提升了财富，但美国大多数家庭缺乏股票敞口，未能从牛市涨幅中受益。这些数据凸显了尽管整体市场强劲，但仍存在的财富不平等问题。

title: How high hopes for Biden’s student-loan forgiveness plans cost borrowers
summary: The Biden administration's student loan forgiveness initiatives had unintended negative consequences for borrowers, as optimistic projections discouraged some from making payments or planning finances. The gap between promised relief and actual implementation left many borrowers worse off.
content: The Biden White House's lofty expectations for its loan forgiveness efforts inadvertently  damaged the financial situation of many student loan borrowers.

zh.title: 拜登学生贷款免除计划的高期望如何让借款人付出代价
zh.summary: 拜登政府的学生贷款免除计划对借款人造成了意想不到的负面后果，因为乐观的预测阻止一些人还款或规划财务。承诺的救济与实际实施之间的差距使许多借款人处于更糟糕的境地。

title: Tesla crushes delivery estimates as it’s seen ‘exiting the EV winter’
summary: Tesla delivered 480,126 vehicles in the last quarter, significantly exceeding even bullish analyst estimates and signaling recovery from the EV market slowdown. The strong performance suggests the electric vehicle market is rebounding after a period of subdued demand.
content: The automaker shipped 480,126 EVs to consumers last quarter — much more than even bullish analysts projected.

zh.title: 特斯拉大幅超越交付估计，被认为正在"走出电动车寒冬"
zh.summary: 特斯拉上一季度交付了480,126辆车，远超看涨分析师的估计，标志着电动汽车市场从缓慢需求时期的复苏。强劲的表现表明电动汽车市场在一段时间的需求疲软后正在反弹。

title: How to bag a bargain flight
summary: A finance expert provides practical tips for finding cheaper flights, including identifying rare error fares and optimizing booking timing. The article also cautions that airline bundle packages may not offer the value they appear to provide.
content: Finance expert Laura Pomfret shares her top tips for finding cheaper flights, from spotting rare error fares to knowing the best time to book. Plus, why airline bundles aren't always the bargain they seem.

zh.title: 如何抢到便宜机票
zh.summary: 一位财经专家提供了寻找便宜航班的实用建议，包括识别罕见的错误票价和优化订票时机。文章还警告说，航空公司的套餐可能不会提供其宣传的价值。

title: Ford Q2 sales drop 10.3% due to F-Series supplier issue, falling EV demand
summary: Ford's Q2 sales declined 10.3% overall, with EV sales plummeting 40.7% year-over-year and iconic F-Series truck sales dropping 11% due to supplier constraints. The results highlight the automaker's struggles in both the electrification transition and traditional vehicle segments.
content: Ford said its EV sales fell by 40.7% during the quarter compared with a year earlier, while sales of its F-Series trucks, including the F-150, fell 11%.

zh.title: 福特Q2销售下降10.3%：F系列供应链问题、电动车需求下降
zh.summary: 福特Q2销售总体下降10.3%，电动车销售同比下跌40.7%，标志性F系列卡车销售因供应链限制下降11%。这些结果凸显了这家汽车制造商在电气化转型和传统车型领域的困境。

title: Why the expected fight over the North American trade deal never kicked off
summary: The U.S. declined to extend a North American trade agreement for another 16 years, but avoided more aggressive trade actions some had anticipated. The measured response suggests preference for negotiated resolution rather than escalation on trade disputes.
content: The US has confirmed it will not extend the agreement for another 16 years, but stopped short of more dramatic action.

zh.title: 为什么预期中的北美贸易协议争议从未爆发
zh.summary: 美国拒绝将北美贸易协议再延长16年，但避免了一些人预期的更激进的贸易行动。这种谨慎的反应表明了偏好通过谈判解决而非在贸易争议上升级。

title: World Cup boom falters as US hospitality jobs fall in June
summary: Initial expectations of a jobs boost from hosting the World Cup did not materialize, as U.S. hospitality employment fell in June. The decline suggests the tournament's economic impact was more limited than anticipated.
content: There had been early signs of a jobs boom from the tournament, but hospitality jobs declined in June.

zh.title: 世界杯热潮褪去，美国酒店业6月就业下滑
zh.summary: 举办世界杯带来就业提振的初期预期并未实现，美国酒店业6月就业人数出现下降。这一下降表明该赛事的经济影响比预期更为有限。

title: Rivian raises 2026 delivery outlook while Lucid misses Wall Street expectations for second quarter
summary: Rivian raised its 2026 EV delivery forecast to 65,000-70,000 units from 62,000-67,000, demonstrating confidence in demand, while competitor Lucid fell short of Wall Street's Q2 expectations. The divergence reflects different trajectories among electric vehicle startups.
content: Rivian is increasing its delivery outlook to between 65,000 and 70,000 EVs, up from 62,000 to 67,000 units.

zh.title: Rivian上调2026年交付预期，Lucid未达华尔街第二季度预期
zh.summary: Rivian将2026年电动汽车交付预期从62,000-67,000辆上调至65,000-70,000辆，展现出对需求的信心，而竞争对手Lucid未能达到华尔街对第二季度的预期。这种分歧反映了电动汽车初创公司之间不同的发展轨迹。

title: Jeff Bezos' family office backed five AI startups in June
summary: Jeff Bezos' family office, Bezos Expeditions, backed five AI startups in June and has become the most active family office investor year-to-date. The investment activity underscores major venture capital interest in the AI sector from prominent wealth holders.
content: Bezos Expeditions is now the most active family office investor thus far this year, per data from Fintrx.

zh.title: 杰夫·贝索斯家族办公室6月支持五家AI初创公司
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯的家族办公室Bezos Expeditions在6月支持了五家AI初创公司，并成为迄今为止年度最活跃的家族办公室投资者。这项投资活动凸显了知名财富持有者对AI领域的重大风险投资兴趣。

title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
summary: U.S. job creation slowed significantly in June with only 57,000 new nonfarm payrolls added against expectations of 115,000, while unemployment edged down to 4.2%. The weaker employment data signals a cooling labor market and potential economic slowdown.
content: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.

zh.title: 美国6月就业增长放缓，非农就业仅增加5.7万，失业率降至4.2%
zh.summary: 美国6月就业创造大幅放缓，新增非农就业仅5.7万人，远低于预期的11.5万人，失业率下降至4.2%。这份较弱的就业数据表明劳动力市场在降温，经济可能面临放缓。

title: The two mounting market risks this summer, according to JPMorgan
summary: JPMorgan has identified two emerging risks that could challenge stock market performance during the summer months. The investment bank's cautionary outlook highlights potential headwinds investors should monitor.
content: JPMorgan thinks the stock market could run into some trouble this summer.

zh.title: 根据摩根大通，今年夏季的两个日益增长的市场风险
zh.summary: 摩根大通已指出了两个可能在夏季冲击股票市场表现的新兴风险。这家投资银行的谨慎预期突显了投资者应该关注的潜在不利因素。

title: Most prediction market contracts have low volume, leaving users exposed to volatility and bots
summary: Despite exponential growth in prediction market activity, many individual contracts suffer from low trading volumes below $10,000, exposing participants to price volatility and bot manipulation risks. The liquidity challenges highlight structural issues in emerging prediction market platforms.
content: Prediction market volume has grown exponentially but several markets never make it over $10,000.

zh.title: 大多数预测市场合约交易量低，用户面临波动风险和机器人操纵
zh.summary: 尽管预测市场活动实现了指数级增长，但许多个别合约的交易量低于1万美元，使参与者面临价格波动和机器人操纵的风险。流动性挑战凸显了新兴预测市场平台的结构性问题。

title: OpenAI reportedly considers handing 5% stake to the government. Here’s why the AI lab would consider that move.
summary: OpenAI is reportedly offering a 5% equity stake to the government as a strategy to address mounting criticism of the AI industry. This move aims to position regulators as equity partners, potentially easing regulatory scrutiny and political pressure.
content: Bringing the government on board as an equity partner may serve to dilute some of the criticism of the AI industry that has developed momentum in recent months.

zh.title: OpenAI据称考虑将5%股份转让给政府。以下是这家AI实验室考虑此举的原因。
zh.summary: OpenAI据称计划向政府提供5%的股权，作为应对AI行业日益增加的批评的策略。此举旨在让监管机构成为股权合伙人，可能会缓解监管审查和政治压力。

title: Google loses fight over record $4.7 billion EU antitrust fine
summary: Google has lost its legal challenge against a record €4 billion EU antitrust fine imposed in 2018 for abusing Android's dominance. The ruling upholds one of the largest tech penalties ever issued and sets a precedent for future antitrust cases.
content: In 2018, the European Commission slapped Google with the record-breaking penalty on the grounds that it abused Android's mobile dominance.

zh.title: 谷歌输掉了针对创纪录47亿美元欧盟反垄断罚款的诉讼
zh.summary: 谷歌输掉了对2018年欧盟因其滥用Android主导地位而处以的创纪录40亿欧元反垄断罚款的法律诉讼。该裁决维持了有史以来最大的科技罚款之一，并为未来的反垄断案件树立了先例。

title: M&A is ‘on fire’ as large-cap firms simplify, Citi UK CEO says
summary: U.K. M&A activity is surging as large multinational firms simplify operations and overseas buyers target British assets, according to Citi's U.K. CEO. The trend reflects broad corporate consolidation and renewed interest in British companies amid market stabilization.
content: Citi U.K. CEO Tiina Lee said U.K. M&A is “on fire” as companies simplify and overseas buyers target British assets.

zh.title: 花旗英国首席执行官表示，随着大型公司简化业务，并购"火爆"进行
zh.summary: 据花旗英国首席执行官称，随着大型跨国公司简化业务和海外买家寻求英国资产，英国并购活动激增。这一趋势反映了广泛的企业整合以及在市场稳定中对英国公司重新燃起的兴趣。

title: Tank maker KNDS postpones IPO amid market struggles for defense
summary: Tank manufacturer KNDS has postponed its Amsterdam IPO citing adverse market conditions in the defense sector. The shareholders determined to delay the offering until market conditions become more favorable for capital market entry.
content: Shareholders of the Amsterdam-based company have decided the process to IPO will proceed "upon the return of more favorable market conditions," KNDS said.

zh.title: 坦克制造商KNDS因防务市场困难推迟IPO上市
zh.summary: 坦克制造商KNDS因防务部门市场环境恶劣而推迟阿姆斯特丹IPO。股东决定推迟融资,待资本市场条件更为有利后再进行。

title: Oil prices on pace for fourth straight weekly loss as Trump sees progress in U.S.-Iran talks
summary: Oil prices fell more than 1% and are tracking toward a fourth consecutive weekly loss following U.S.-Iran diplomatic talks. The decline reflects optimism about potential progress in negotiations between Washington and Tehran.
content: Oil prices fell more than 1% on Wednesday after talks between Washington and Tehran concluded.

zh.title: 特朗普称美伊谈判取得进展,油价面临连续第四周下跌
zh.summary: 在美伊外交谈判后,油价下跌超过1%,面临连续第四周下跌。下跌反映了市场对华盛顿和德黑兰谈判潜在进展的乐观预期。

title: Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix shares tumble over 9% as chip rout spreads from Wall Street
summary: Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix shares plummeted over 7% in early trading as the semiconductor selloff that began on Wall Street spreads to Asian chipmakers. The decline signals continued sector weakness amid broader market concerns about chip valuations.
content: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix plummeted more than 7% in early Thursday trading.

zh.title: 芯片抛售从华尔街蔓延至亚洲,三星和SK海力士股价跌幅超过9%
zh.summary: 随着华尔街的半导体抛售蔓延至亚洲芯片制造商,三星电子和SK海力士股价在早盘暴跌7%以上。在对芯片估值的广泛市场担忧下,该行业持续显示疲软迹象。

title: OpenAI proposes 5% stake to Trump administration to ease Washington pressure: report
summary: OpenAI has proposed offering a 5% ownership stake to the Trump administration to ease political pressure on AI companies. The proposal aligns with Trump's stated belief that government ownership stakes would make the public "partners" in the AI revolution.
content: Trump said in June that the U.S. taking an ownership stake in AI giants would be "a beautiful thing" and make American public "partners in this revolution."

zh.title: OpenAI向特朗普政府提议5%股份以缓解华盛顿压力：报告
zh.summary: OpenAI已向特朗普政府提议提供5%的所有权股份，以缓解对AI公司的政治压力。该提议符合特朗普的既定信念，即政府所有权股份会使公众成为AI革命的"合作伙伴"。

title: Apple plans five new iPhones through 2027, eyes Chinese-made chips amid foldable push, reports say
summary: Apple is planning five new iPhone models through 2027 and exploring Chinese memory suppliers for foldable device expansion. The diversified supply chain strategy reflects Apple's push to develop new form factors while managing geopolitical supply chain risks.
content: Apple is planning five new iPhones by 2027 and is considering Chinese memory suppliers as it expands foldable production, reports say.

zh.title: 苹果计划推出五款新iPhone至2027年，在推进可折叠设备中关注中国制造芯片
zh.summary: 苹果正计划推出五款新iPhone机型至2027年，并为可折叠设备扩展探索中国内存供应商。这种多元化供应链战略反映了苹果在开发新外形因素的同时管理地缘政治供应链风险的努力。

title: Meta says WhatsApp usernames are safeguarded against scams after India flags cybersecurity risks
summary: Meta has defended WhatsApp's username feature against Indian government cybersecurity concerns, asserting that built-in safeguards protect against scams. The dispute underscores regulatory tension between tech companies and governments over platform security standards.
content: Meta has defended its WhatsApp username feature after the Indian government raised cybersecurity concerns.

zh.title: Meta表示WhatsApp用户名在印度标记网络安全风险后受到防诈骗保护
zh.summary: Meta为WhatsApp的用户名功能辩护，针对印度政府的网络安全担忧，声称内置的保护措施可防止诈骗。这场争议凸显了科技公司与政府之间关于平台安全标准的监管紧张关系。

title: Russia launches massive strike on Ukraine as Poland scrambles jets, Finland restricts airspace
summary: Russia launched a massive strike on Ukraine using long-range weapons and drones, prompting Poland to scramble fighter jets and Finland to restrict airspace. The escalation highlights intensifying military conflict in Eastern Europe with regional spillover effects.
content: The Russian defence ministry said that it launched a "massive strike using long-range precision air, land, and sea-based weapons and attack drones."

zh.title: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发起大规模攻击，波兰紧急出动战斗机，芬兰限制空域
zh.summary: 俄罗斯使用远程武器和无人机对乌克兰发起了大规模攻击，促使波兰紧急出动战斗机，芬兰限制空域。这次升级凸显了东欧地区日益激化的军事冲突及其对周边地区的影响。

title: Singapore seizes $42m mansion over Nvidia chip smuggling
summary: Singapore seized a $42 million mansion in a probe into the illegal smuggling of servers containing Nvidia AI semiconductors. The seizure reflects authorities' efforts to combat the black market trade in restricted AI hardware.
content: The luxury home was seized as part of a probe into the illegal trade of servers containing AI semiconductors.

zh.title: 新加坡查获价值4200万美元豪宅，涉英伟达芯片走私
zh.summary: 新加坡在调查非法走私含有英伟达人工智能芯片的服务器案件中查获了一座价值4200万美元的豪宅。这次查获反映了当局打击限制性人工智能硬件黑市交易的努力。

title: Old British fridges 'cannot cope with the heat'
summary: Older British refrigerators are failing under hot weather conditions as rising temperatures strain aging cooling systems. Experts warn that many households have appliances unable to handle climate change-driven temperature increases.
content: Experts say older fridges are failing in hot weather as rising temperatures put them under pressure.

zh.title: 老旧英国冰箱"无法应对炎热"
zh.summary: 随着气温上升对陈旧冷却系统造成压力，英国的老旧冰箱在炎热天气条件下故障。专家警告许多家庭的电器无法承受气候变化导致的温度上升。

title: Volkswagen braces for boardroom showdown over historic cost-cutting plan
summary: Volkswagen is preparing for a major boardroom battle over plans to close four factories and cut 100,000 jobs as part of historic restructuring. The dramatic cost-cutting measures signal the auto giant's struggle to adapt to the electric vehicle transition.
content: Volkswagen is poised for a boardroom showdown following reports that the auto giant is weighing up shutting four factories and implementing 100,000 job cuts.

zh.title: 大众汽车董事会掀起波澜，酝酿重磅成本削减计划
zh.summary: 大众汽车正为其历史性重组计划准备一场重大的董事会争议，该计划包括关闭四家工厂和裁员10万人。这些剧烈的成本削减措施反映出这家汽车巨头在适应电动汽车转型过程中面临的困难。

title: Amazon is designing its own AI chips for Echo, Fire TV and future devices, exec tells CNBC
summary: Amazon is developing custom AI chips for Echo, Fire TV, and future devices to reduce semiconductor supplier dependence. The proprietary chip strategy reflects Amazon's broader push to control its hardware stack amid AI expansion.
content: Amazon hardware chief Panos Panay says the company is designing custom chips for key devices as it experiments with AI gadgets.

zh.title: 亚马逊为Echo、Fire TV及未来设备设计自有AI芯片，高管告诉CNBC
zh.summary: 亚马逊正在为Echo、Fire TV和未来设备开发定制AI芯片，以减少对半导体供应商的依赖。这项专有芯片战略反映了亚马逊在AI扩展中控制其硬件堆栈的更广泛推动。

title: World Cup dreams shattered as StubHub tickets cancelled at last minute
summary: Hundreds of StubHub ticket holders had their World Cup tickets cancelled last-minute, derailing their plans to attend the tournament. The cancellations highlight vulnerabilities in secondary ticket market practices and consumer protection gaps.
content: Hundreds of fans who bought World Cup tickets on resale site StubHub say they have had them cancelled at the last minute.

zh.title: 世界杯梦想破灭，StubHub门票在最后关头被取消
zh.summary: 数百名StubHub票务持有者在最后关头突然被取消世界杯门票，打乱了他们参加赛事的计划。这些取消凸显了二级票务市场实践中的漏洞和消费者保护的缺陷。

title: Inside India newsletter: Amazon, Walmart-owned Flipkart get ready to shake upIndia's delivery-in-minutes sector
summary: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are rapidly expanding quick commerce operations in India to capture growth and maintain relevance in the fast-growing delivery-in-minutes market. Both retailers are intensifying competition in this high-growth segment.
content: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are scrambling to expand quick commerce operations in India, not just to chase growth but to remain relevant to consumers.

zh.title: 印度内部通讯：亚马逊和沃尔玛旗下Flipkart准备在印度分钟级配送市场掀起波澜
zh.summary: 亚马逊和沃尔玛旗下Flipkart正在印度快速扩展快速电商业务，以获得增长并在快速增长的分钟级配送市场中保持相关性。两家零售商在这一高增长细分市场中加剧了竞争。

title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
summary: A House Judiciary Committee report found that the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies. The findings raise concerns about unfair trade practices and market access barriers in South Korea.
content: The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies, in a new report.

zh.title: 众议院报告发现韩国政府对Coupang和美国公司存在歧视
zh.summary: 众议院司法委员会的报告发现，韩国政府对Coupang和其他美国公司存在歧视。这些发现引发了对韩国不公平贸易行为和市场准入壁垒的担忧。
